eyebrow.zh: 加载前证明 · SBOM · 溯源签名
eyebrow.en: Attest before load · SBOM · Signed provenance

headline.zh:
Coding Agent 加载 Skill 前
先拒绝未签名的代码
headline.en:
Before your agent loads a Skill
it refuses unsigned code

sub.zh: attestload 为每个 Skill / MCP server 目录派生内容寻址的 SBOM、捕获 git 溯源并签名（Sigstore keyless 或本地 ed25519）；verify 在加载前逐字节校验，被篡改或未签名即以退出码 1 拒绝。
sub.en: attestload derives a content-addressed SBOM for each Skill / MCP-server directory, captures git provenance, and signs it (Sigstore keyless or local ed25519); verify checks it byte-for-byte before load and refuses anything tampered or unsigned with exit code 1.

body.zh: 成熟的 SBOM / SLSA / Sigstore 原语第一次接到 agent 加载 Skill 的那条路径上：verify 用退出码 0 / 1 直接做 CI 与 git hook 的闸门。要给容器镜像签名用 cosign，要扫 CVE 用 Trivy——但让 Coding Agent 在加载前拒绝未经证明的代码，这个动词目前只有 attestload。
body.en: Mature SBOM / SLSA / Sigstore primitives, wired for the first time into the agent's skill-loading path: verify's 0 / 1 exit code is the gate for CI and git hooks. Use cosign to sign container images and Trivy to scan CVEs — but refusing unattested code before a coding agent loads it is a verb only attestload has.

title.zh: 随目录分发的证明清单
title.en: An attestation manifest that travels with the directory

body.zh: attest 产出一个签名包，随 Skill / MCP 目录一起分发：subject（名称 / 版本 / 目录 sha256 摘要）、SPDX-lite SBOM、内容寻址的逐文件清单（path · sha256 · size）、SLSA-lite 溯源，以及 Sigstore + Rekor 日志索引（或 ed25519 本地兜底）的签名。
body.en: attest emits a signed bundle that ships alongside the Skill / MCP directory: subject (name / version / directory sha256 digest), an SPDX-lite SBOM, a content-addressed per-file manifest (path · sha256 · size), SLSA-lite provenance, and a Sigstore + Rekor log-index signature (or a local ed25519 fallback).

chips: › SLSA-lite 溯源 · Rekor 日志

title.zh: 被篡改即 TAMPERED，未签名即 UNSIGNED

body.zh: verify 在加载前重算目录摘要并逐字节比对：签名之后再塞进一个文件会被判 digest-mismatch（TAMPERED），没有清单则 UNSIGNED——两者都以退出码 1 拒绝，绝不因坏输入而崩溃。策略可要求 provenance、有效签名，以及允许的签名身份。
body.en: verify re-hashes the directory and compares byte-for-byte before load: a file slipped in after signing is caught as digest-mismatch (TAMPERED), a missing manifest is UNSIGNED — both refuse with exit code 1 and never crash on bad input. Policy can require provenance, a valid signature, and allowed signer identities.

title.zh: 单 CLI · 离线优先 · 白名单兜底冷启动
title.en: One CLI, offline-first, allowlist for cold start

body.zh: 一个 Node CLI，无服务、无数据库、无 Kubernetes，仅在签名 / 验签时访问公共 Sigstore。作者还没签名时，index 维护一份已验证 Skill 的摘要白名单先兜底；guard install 再往仓库装一个 git pre-commit 钩子，每次提交前自动校验。
body.en: A single Node CLI — no service, no database, no Kubernetes; it touches the public Sigstore only when signing or verifying. Before authors sign, index keeps a digest allowlist of verified Skills as a cold-start floor; guard install drops a git pre-commit hook that verifies before every commit.

chips: › index 白名单 · guard 钩子

headline.zh: 让 agent 加载前先证明
headline.en: Attest it before your agent loads it

sub.zh: MIT 许可，npm i -g attestload 即用：attest 签发证明，verify 拒绝未证明代码，index 兜底冷启动。
sub.en: MIT-licensed, npm i -g attestload and go: attest issues an attestation, verify refuses unattested code, index covers the cold start.

tag.zh: 面向 Coding Agent 的 attest-before-load 拒绝闸门
tag.en: The attest-before-load gate for coding agents
